comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Nav Log out button (1.8.3): added a signed-in-only 'Log out' button after the Admin link on every page (<li class='nav__admin'><button class='nav__logout'>). initAdminLink generalized to initSessionNav — same session reveal, plus wires the button to auth.signOut(); onAuthStateChange(null) then hides both Admin + Log out. Styled like nav links w/ red-tinted hover. Verified: both hidden logged-out, both show (Admin · Log out) when signed in. (Open: buy/donate URLs; real artwork/audio; mobile listen-test.)
